// schema_field: Always 1 in v1. Inspector aborts if it reads a profile with a different schema.
// generator_version: Version of x-worktree-isolate that emitted this profile.
// stack: Stack adapter. Only docker-compose is implemented in v1.
// compose_files: Resolved relative to repo root, depth <= 2.
// compose_override_target: Where apply writes the merge override (gitignored).
// env_file_target: Where apply writes per-worktree env overrides (gitignored).

port_strategy.// mode: registry — slot index N tracked in ~/.config/worktree-isolate/<sha1>/registry.json.
port_strategy.// scan_range: Inclusive lower / upper bound for fallback scan after deterministic candidate.
port_strategy.// ports: Flat list of host port vars the inspector found (used by allocator). Each var also appears under services_to_strip[*].ports keyed by service name (used by renderer).

ports.// service: compose service that consumes this port (informational; renderer keys on services_to_strip[*].service).
ports.// default: Slot 0 candidate. Slot N candidate = default + N*1000.
ports.// container_port: Port inside the container (right-hand side of host:container).

// data_dirs: Host volume paths that must be unique per worktree.

data_dirs.// dind_identity_mount: True when compose mount is ${V}:${V} — required for docker.sock-spawned containers.

// services_to_strip: Per-service override targets. Apply emits services.<service>: blocks (Compose merges by service KEY, not container_name). container_name is null when service has no hardcoded container_name but does have hardcoded host ports.

services_to_strip.// service: YAML service key in compose.yml (renderer uses this as the override block key).
services_to_strip.// container_name: Hardcoded container_name from base compose (or null if none). When set, renderer emits container_name: !reset null.
services_to_strip.// ports: Subset of port_strategy.ports[] entries that belong to this service. Renderer emits ports: !override using these.

// service_dns_references: Substring matches between env values and stripped names — informational only.

global_label_warnings.// severity: blocker = apply halts unless --ignore-warnings; warning = logged only.

// single_worktree_profiles: Compose profiles flagged for single-worktree-only services.
